text:
来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4016
故障现象：Axis %1 already used by NCU %2

【可能原因】
1. Axis %1 already used by NCU %2
2. An attempt was made to apply setpoints to one axis from several NCUs. Only occurs with the NCU link system
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4016 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Define a correct, unique axis assignment.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4035
故障现象：Interpolation cycle from NCU%1 = %2 does not match NCU%3 = %4

【可能原因】
1. Interpolation cycle from NCU%1 = %2 does not match NCU%3 = %4
2. Occurs only with an NCU link system. The interpolation cycles of the NCUs specified in the alarm do not match one another. The slowest IPO cycle in interconnected NCU systems must be an integral multiple of all configured IPO cycles.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4035 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Set a suitable value in MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO for all interconnected NCUs.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4152
故障现象：Illegal configuration of the 'Block display with absolute values' function

【可能原因】
1. Illegal configuration of the 'Block display with absolute values' function
2. The "Block display with absolute values" function has been illegally parameterized: - An illegal block length has been set with $MC_MM_ABSBLOCK: While ramping up, the machine data will be checked for the following value range: 0, 1, 128 to 512 - An i
3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4152 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Configure block length/display range within the permissible limits.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

报警代码：1014
故障现象：Channel %1 system error %2

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 system error %2
2. With this alarm, internal alarm states are displayed that, in conjunction with the transferred error number, provide information on the cause and location of the error.
3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. Local alarm reaction. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on 

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 1014 详情

【处理建议】

来源：fanuc_alarm_list
机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS1508
故障现象：DUPLICATE

【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：DUPLICATE
2. M-CODE (INDEX TABLE REVERSING) M A function to which the same code as this M code is set exists. (index table indexing)

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS1508 或 CNC1508
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：8031
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 axis %3: Axis has no IPO functionality

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 axis %3: Axis has no IPO functionality
2. An axis/spindle that has been defined as a special axis/auxiliary spindle (see $MA_BASE_FUNCTION_MASK bit8), should be operated as an interpolating axis.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 8031 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Define axis as interpolating axis (see $MA_BASE_FUNCTION_MASK bit8) or change part program
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：2100
故障现象：NCK battery warning threshold reached

【可能原因】
1. NCK battery warning threshold reached
2. The undervoltage monitor of the NCK battery has reached the prewarning threshold. This is at 2.7-2.9 V (nominal voltage of the battery is 3.0-3.1 V at 950 mAh).
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 2100 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The battery must be replaced within the next 6 weeks. After this period, the voltage can drop below the alarm limit of 2.4-2.6 V if the RAMs to be buffered take up a lot of current.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4184
故障现象：Channel %1 illegally predefined auxiliary function in %2%3, MD reset

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 illegally predefined auxiliary function in %2%3, MD reset
2. In the specified machine data, a predefined auxiliary function has been illegally configured. The value set by the user has been reset to the default value by the system.
3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4184 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Configure a valid value in the specified machine data.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

【可能原因】

2. NOT COMMANDED G31 1) G31 cannot be specified. This alarm is generated when a G code (such as for tool radius/tool nose radius compensation) of group 07 is not canceled. 2) A torque limit skip was not specified in a torque limit skip command (G31P98 o

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10778
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 preprocessing stop with active tool radius

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 preprocessing stop with active tool radius
2. If a preprocessing stop is detected with active tool radius compensation (either programmed by the user or generated internally) and the setting data $SC_STOP_CUTCOM_STOPRE is set, then this warning is issued because in this situation machine movemen
3. 系统反应：Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10778 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Continue machining with CANCEL and Start. - Modify part program. - Set setting data $SC_STOP_CUTCOM_STOPRE to FALSE.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10755
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 selection of the tool radius compensation via

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 selection of the tool radius compensation via
2. When activating the cutter radius compensation with KONT the starting point of the approach block is within the compensation circle and therefore already violates the contour. If the cutter radius compensation is selected with G41/G42, the approach b
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10755 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Place selection of the CRC such that the starting point of the approach movements comes to rest outside of the correction circle around the target point (programmed traversing movements > compensation radius). The following possibilities are available: - Selection in the previous block - Insert in
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：manual:cnc_common_faults.md
机床系统：精密加工中心
故障现象：加工尺寸超差，同批次零件一致性差

【可能原因】
1. 刀具磨损未补偿
2. 热变形导致坐标漂移
3. 反向间隙或螺距误差
4. 装夹变形或基准不一致

【排查步骤】
1. 测量刀具磨损并检查补偿表
2. 监控温升与坐标漂移量
3. 做球杆仪/激光干涉检测
4. 对比首件与末件尺寸变化
5. 检查程序刀补与坐标系

【处理建议】
1. 及时更新刀具磨损补偿
2. 开启热补偿或预热机床
3. 执行螺距补偿与间隙校准
4. 优化装夹减少变形
5. 加强首件检验与过程抽检

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10751
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 danger of collision due to tool radius

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 danger of collision due to tool radius
2. The "Bottleneck detection" (calculation of intersection for the following compensated traversing blocks) has not been able to calculate a point of intersection for the reviewed number of traversing blocks. It is therefore possible that one of the equ
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10751 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Check the part program and, if possible, modify the programming so that inside corners with smaller paths than the correction value are avoided. (Outside corners are not critical because the equidistants are lengthened or intermediate blocks
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics

故障现象：Channel %1 channel-specific protection zone %2 reached with axis %3

2. The workpiece-related channel-specific protection zone has been reached with the specified axis. Note that another tool-related protection zone is still active. The workpiece-related protection zone can be traversed when the PLC has issued an enable 
3. 系统反应：Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：fanuc_alarm_list
机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS446
故障现象：ILLEGAL

【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：ILLEGAL
2. COMMAND IN G96.1/G96.2/G96.3/G96.4 T G96.1, G96.2, G96.3, and G96.4 are specified in the block that includes other commands. Modify the program.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS446 或 CNC446
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6584 详情

2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：ai4i2020:OSF:sensor
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：根据传感器数据判定异常类型
传感器特征：Torque [Nm] 超限，Rotational speed [rpm] 下降

【可能原因】
1. 切深或进给过大
2. 刀具钝化导致切削力增大
3. 工件或刀具装夹刚性不足

【排查步骤】
1. 检查当前切削参数
2. 评估刀具磨损与装夹状态
3. 对比历史正常加工电流/扭矩
4. 检查是否存在机械干涉

【处理建议】
1. 降低切深与进给速度
2. 更换锋利刀具
3. 改善装夹方案提高刚性
4. 优化刀路减少瞬时负载

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4630
故障现象：Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1

【可能原因】
1. Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1
2. For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: The reference in $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE to a corresponding entry in machine data array $MN_HANDWHEEL_LOGIC_ADDRESS[] which is required for configuring PROFIBUS handwheels is not available.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4630 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Configure the machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE for the corresponding PROFIBUS handwheel so that there is a valid reference to an entry in the machine data array $MN_HANDWHEEL_LOGIC_ADDRESS[].
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：ai4i2020:RNF:sensor
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：根据传感器数据判定异常类型
传感器特征：各传感器读数无明显规律，Machine failure 偶发

【可能原因】
1. 电气接触不良或信号干扰
2. 传感器偶发失效
3. 软件/PLC 逻辑边界条件触发

【排查步骤】
1. 调取故障前后报警与操作日志
2. 检查电缆屏蔽与接地
3. 对各传感器做交叉验证
4. 排查近期程序或参数变更

【处理建议】
1. 紧固接头并改善屏蔽
2. 更换可疑传感器
3. 回滚异常参数变更
4. 建立故障复现记录便于根因分析

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：2194
故障现象：Link axis active and $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE != 3

【可能原因】
1. Link axis active and $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE != 3
2. At least one axis is to be distributed via NCU link, then the machine data $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE must be 3. Occurs only with an NCU link system.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 2194 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Set $MN_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE to 3.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS1538 或 CNC1538
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

3. 报警清除后重新回零验证

来源：ai4i2020:TWF:sensor
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：根据传感器数据判定异常类型
传感器特征：Tool wear [min] 持续上升，扭矩 [Nm] 波动加大

【可能原因】
1. 刀具达到寿命极限未及时更换
2. 切削参数与材料不匹配加速磨损
3. 冷却不足导致刀具过热磨损

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刀具磨损计数与当前刀刃状态
2. 对比正常工况下的扭矩与振动趋势
3. 审查切削速度与每齿进给是否过大
4. 确认冷却液喷射是否对准刀尖

【处理建议】
1. 更换磨损刀具并重新对刀
2. 优化切削参数降低刀具负载
3. 恢复冷却液流量与浓度
4. 设置刀具寿命预警阈值

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4210
故障现象：Channel %1 spindle %2 declaration as rotary axis missing

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 spindle %2 declaration as rotary axis missing
2. If a machine axis is to be operated as a spindle, this machine axis must be declared as a rotary axis.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4210 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Set rotary axis declaration for this machine axis in the axis-specific MD 30300 IS_ROT_AX.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

For this purpose, the geometry axis index for the displayed geometry axis must be determined by means of the channel-specific MD array 20060 AXCONF_GEOAX_NAME_TAB. The channel axis number
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复

3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6500
故障现象：NC memory full

【可能原因】
1. NC memory full
2. The NCK file system is full. The available buffered memory does not suffice. Note: At initial start-up, files of the NC file system may be affected such as drive data, MMC files, FIFO files, NC programs...
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6500 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Adjust the size of the buffered memory ($MN_MM_USER_MEM_BUFFERED) or increase the space available in the buffered memory, e.g. by unloading part programs that are no longer being used. Or decrease the size of the ring buffer (see $MC_RESU_RING_BUFFER_SIZE).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10635 详情

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The tool radius compensation for working area limitations in JOG mode can only be taken into account for milling or drilling tools.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. - Erroneous PLC communication: Correct the PLC program. - It is possible to release NCK with the PLC command 7 from the wait condition. This aborts the waiting command.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

2. The EMERGENCY STOP request is applied to the NCK/PLC interface DB10 DBX56.1 (Emergency stop).

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Rectify the cause of EMERGENCY STOP, and acknowledge EMERGENCY STOP via the PLC/NCK interface DB10 DBX56.1 (Emergency stop).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4034
故障现象：Local link axis %1 is not allowed for different interpolation cycle time =

【可能原因】
1. Local link axis %1 is not allowed for different interpolation cycle time =
2. Local link axes are only permissible on an NCU if the interpolation cycle set corresponds to the slowest interpolation cycle of the interconnected NCU systems.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4034 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Remove local link axis (see MN_AXCONF_MACHAX_NAME_TAB and MN_AXCT_AXCONF_ASSIGN_TAB1) or adapt the interpolation cycle (MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：manual:cnc_common_faults.md
机床系统：通用五轴/三轴加工中心
故障现象：切削过程振动加剧，工件表面出现振纹

【可能原因】
1. 刀具磨损或悬伸过长
2. 工件装夹刚性不足
3. 切削参数与机床固有频率共振
4. 丝杠/导轨松动或轴承间隙过大

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刀具磨损量与悬伸长度
2. 检查工装夹具压紧力与支撑点
3. 降低切深/转速做对比试切
4. 检查各轴联轴器与导轨螺栓
5. 查看振动传感器或电流波动趋势

【处理建议】
1. 更换刀具或缩短悬伸
2. 增加支撑、优化装夹方案
3. 调整转速避开共振区
4. 紧固机械传动部件
5. 必要时进行动平衡或几何精度检测

【处理建议】
1. Select another function, another toolholder/spindle, position tool on toolholder/spindle.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 protection zone monitoring is not guaranteed

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 protection zone monitoring is not guaranteed
2. New movements of a geometry axis which have been added could not be allowed for at the time of block preparation. It is therefore not certain that the protection zones will not be violated. This is just a warning message without further reactions.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10704 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Take other measures to ensure that the geomotry axes motion, including the additional motion, does not violate the protection zones. (The warning comes nevertheless) or exclude additional motions.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

故障现象：Machine data have been changed - now memory is reorganized

【可能原因】
1. Machine data have been changed - now memory is reorganized
2. Machine data have been changed that define the NC user memory allocation. Data management has restructured the memory in accordance with the altered machine data.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6020 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. No remedial measures are required. Any user data that are required must be input again.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：fanuc_alarm_list
机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS77
故障现象：TOO

【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：TOO
2. MANY SUB,MACRO NESTING The total number of subprogram and macro calls exceeds the permissible range. Another subprogram call was executed during an external memory subprogram call. A.ALARM LIST APPENDIX B-64305EN/03

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS77 或 CNC77
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10760
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 helical axis is not parallel to tool orientation

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 helical axis is not parallel to tool orientation
2. With active tool radius compensation a helix is only permissible if the helix axis is parallel to the tool, i.e. the circle plane and the compensation plane must be identical.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10760 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Orient helix axis perpendicular to the machining plane.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS156 或 CNC156
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

3. 系统反应：NC not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

1. Channel %1 block %2 thread with frame not executable
2. The current frame is corrupting the reference between the thread length and the thread lead.
3. 系统反应：Local alarm reaction. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10607 详情

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Perform thread cutting with G33, G34, G35 without a frame. - Use G63 or G331/G332. NCK alarms 01/2008
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：ai4i2020:PWF
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：主轴转速波动，扭矩输出不稳定，可能伴随驱动器报警
传感器特征：Rotational speed [rpm] 波动，Torque [Nm] 异常

【可能原因】
1. 电源电压不稳或缺相
2. 主轴/伺服驱动器故障
3. 电机绕组或接线异常

【排查步骤】
1. 测量进线三相电压与平衡度
2. 检查驱动器报警代码
3. 检查电机接线与接地
4. 查看近期是否有过载工况

【处理建议】
1. 排除电网问题后重启驱动器
2. 修复或更换故障驱动模块
3. 检查并紧固电气连接
4. 复核过载保护参数设置

2. The workpiece-related NCK protection zone has been reached with the specified axis. Note that another tool-related protection zone is still active. The workpiece-related protection zone can be traversed when the PLC has issued an enable signal.

2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4150
故障现象：Channel %1 invalid M function subprogram call configured

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 invalid M function subprogram call configured
2. The machine data $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE[n] or $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE_PAR contains invalid configration data: An M function, which is used by the system and can not be replaced by a subprogram call has been specified in the machine data $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE[n]
3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4150 详情

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Configure an M function in the machine data $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE[n] that is not assigned by the system, or configure a permissible array index in the machine data $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE_PAR.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10637
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3
2. The tool radius compensation of the working area limitation of the stated axis is not taken into account. Reason: No tool is active. The alarm is reported in JOG mode.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10637 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The tool radius compensation for working area limitations in JOG mode cannot be taken into account wihout an active tool.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：ai4i2020:PWF:sensor
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：根据传感器数据判定异常类型
传感器特征：Rotational speed [rpm] 波动，Torque [Nm] 异常

【可能原因】
1. 电源电压不稳或缺相
2. 主轴/伺服驱动器故障
3. 电机绕组或接线异常

【排查步骤】
1. 测量进线三相电压与平衡度
2. 检查驱动器报警代码
3. 检查电机接线与接地
4. 查看近期是否有过载工况

【处理建议】
1. 排除电网问题后重启驱动器
2. 修复或更换故障驱动模块
3. 检查并紧固电气连接
4. 复核过载保护参数设置

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：7020
故障现象：Compile cycle alarm number has not been defined

【可能原因】
1. Compile cycle alarm number has not been defined
2. The alarm ID used by the compile cycle manufacturer is not known to the system. This was not allocated when the compile cycle alarms were generated.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 7020 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The alarm can have 2 possible causes: - The alarm number has not been defined. A definition must still be made. - The call parameter used is not the same as the one transferred by the NCK.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：5000
故障现象：Communication job not executable %1

【可能原因】
1. Communication job not executable %1
2. The communication job (data exchange between NCK and MMC, e.g.: loading an NC part program) cannot be executed because there is insufficient memory space. Cause: Too many communication jobs in parallel.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 5000 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Reduce the number of communication jobs taking place at the same time or increase MD10134 $MN_MM_NUM_MMC_UNITS - Restart communication job. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. No remedial measures are possible - the operation triggering the alarm message has to be repeated. 
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

1. Channel %1 tool move not possible. Tool %2 not available/not usable.
2. The desired tool motion command - triggered from the HMI or PLC - is not possible. The status of the named tool does not allow movement of the tool. The named tool is not defined or not permitted for the command.
3. 系统反应：NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6424 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Check whether the tool status 'is being changed' ('H20') is set. If yes, then the appropriate tool change command must first be completed by the PLC. Then the tool should be able to be moved. - Check whether the tool data are correctly defined. Has the correct T number been specified? - Check whet
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

【可能原因】

2. NUMBER NOT FOUND The specifi ed sequence No. was not found during sequence number search. The sequence No. specified as the jump destination in GOTO–– and M99P–– was not found.

【排查步骤】

2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式

4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】

3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4021
故障现象：Channel %1 identifier %2 used several times in machine data %3

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 identifier %2 used several times in machine data %3
2. To determine the name in the channel-specific tables for geometry axes and channel axes an identifier already existing in the control has been used.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4021 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Select for the identifier to be entered a character string that is not yet used in the system (max. 32 characters).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10756
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 deselection of the tool radius compensation via

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 deselection of the tool radius compensation via
2. On deselection of the cutter radius compensation, the programmed end point is within the compensation circle. If this point were in fact to be approached without compensation, there would be a contour violation. If the cutter radius compensation is 
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10756 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Place deselection of the CRC such that the programmed end point comes to rest outside the compensation circle around the last active compensation point. The following possibilities are available: - Deselection in the next block - Insert intermediate block - Select retract behavior NORM
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：manual:cnc_common_faults.md
机床系统：通用加工中心
故障现象：主轴过热报警，机床自动停机

【可能原因】
1. 冷却液不足或冷却泵故障
2. 主轴轴承润滑不良或磨损
3. 长时间高负荷切削导致温升过快
4. 主轴电机散热风扇停转

【排查步骤】
1. 检查冷却液液位与泵运行状态
2. 查看主轴温度传感器读数与历史趋势
3. 检查主轴润滑脂/油气润滑系统
4. 确认主轴风扇与散热风道是否堵塞
5. 回顾近期切削参数是否偏大

【处理建议】
1. 补充或更换冷却液，修复冷却泵
2. 降低转速与进给，间歇切削降温
3. 按计划补充润滑或更换轴承
4. 清理散热风道，修复风扇
5. 恢复运行前做空运转温升测试

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4282
故障现象：Hardware of external NCK outputs assigned repeatedly

【可能原因】
1. Hardware of external NCK outputs assigned repeatedly
2. Several outputs have been configured on the same hardware byte.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4282 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Alter MD 10364 HW_ASSIGN_DIG_FASTOUT or MD 10364 HW_ASSIGN_ANA_FASTOUT.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10634
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2, tool radius compensation is inactive for type %3
2. The tool radius compensation of the working area limitation of the stated axis is not taken into account. Reason: The tool is not oriented parallel to the axis (e.g. because toolcarrier or transformation is active). The alarm is reported in JOG mode.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10634 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The tool radius compensation for working area limitations in JOG mode can only be taken into account if the tool is parallel to the axis. Active transformation and toolcarrier must be switched off for this function.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Increase size of local buffer area.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4022
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2: axis container %3 switch not allowed: ext. work

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2: axis container %3 switch not allowed: ext. work
2. The axis container switch enable cannot be given because an external zero offset is active.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4022 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The program must be aborted with the RESET key and the external zero point offset deselected before the container is advanced.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：manual:cnc_common_faults.md
机床系统：通用 CNC
故障现象：程序执行中断，提示超程或软限位报警

【可能原因】
1. 程序零点与工件坐标系不匹配
2. 软限位参数设置过小
3. 回零未完成即启动加工
4. 对刀数据错误或刀具补偿异常

【排查步骤】
1. 确认回零状态与参考点建立
2. 核对 G54-G59 工件坐标
3. 检查软限位与行程参数
4. 仿真运行程序检查极值坐标
5. 验证刀具长度/半径补偿值

【处理建议】
1. 重新回零并建立工件坐标系
2. 修正程序或对刀数据
3. 合理放宽软限位（在安全范围内）
4. 使用图形仿真预检刀路
5. 修正后先空跑再切削

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics

报警代码：4050
故障现象：NC code identifier %1 cannot be reconfigured to %2

【可能原因】
1. NC code identifier %1 cannot be reconfigured to %2
2. Renaming of an NC code was not possible for one of the following reasons: - The old identifier does not exist - The new identifier is within one type range. NC codes/keywords can be reconfigured as long as you stay within the type range. Type 1: "tru
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4050 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Correct machine data 10712: NC_USER_CODE_CONF_NAME_TAB (protection level 1). The list must be built up as follows: Even address: Identifier to be modified Following odd address: New identifier e.g.: NC_USER_CODE_CONF_NAME_TAB [10] = "ROT", N
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：ai4i2020:TWF
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：刀具磨损时间累计偏高，加工表面粗糙度恶化，切削力波动增大
传感器特征：Tool wear [min] 持续上升，扭矩 [Nm] 波动加大

【可能原因】
1. 刀具达到寿命极限未及时更换
2. 切削参数与材料不匹配加速磨损
3. 冷却不足导致刀具过热磨损

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刀具磨损计数与当前刀刃状态
2. 对比正常工况下的扭矩与振动趋势
3. 审查切削速度与每齿进给是否过大
4. 确认冷却液喷射是否对准刀尖

【处理建议】
1. 更换磨损刀具并重新对刀
2. 优化切削参数降低刀具负载
3. 恢复冷却液流量与浓度
4. 设置刀具寿命预警阈值

3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

3. 报警清除后重新回零验证

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10203
故障现象：Channel %1 NC start without reference point (action=%2)

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 NC start without reference point (action=%2)
2. NC start has been activated in the MDI or AUTOMATIC mode and at least one axis that needs to be referenced has not reached its reference point.
3. 系统反应：Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10203 详情

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Via the channel-specific MD 20700: REFP_NC_START_LOCK (NC Start without reference point) you can decide whether or not the axis has to be referenced before NC Start. The start of referencing can be enabled channel-specific or axisspecific. 
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：ai4i2020:HDF
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：工艺温度与空气温度温差异常，机床温升过快
传感器特征：Process temperature [K] 偏高，Air/Process 温差缩小

【可能原因】
1. 冷却系统效率下降或堵塞
2. 环境通风不良
3. 长时间连续高负荷运行

【排查步骤】
1. 检查冷却泵、风扇与换热器运行
2. 清理冷却液管路和过滤网
3. 监测主轴与进给轴温升曲线
4. 检查车间环境温度与通风

【处理建议】
1. 修复冷却系统并补充冷却液
2. 清理散热通道
3. 合理安排间歇加工降低热负荷
4. 必要时检修换热器

机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS70
故障现象：NO PROGRAM

【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：NO PROGRAM
2. SPACE IN MEMORY The memory area is insufficient. Delete any unnecessary programs, then retry.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS70 或 CNC70
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

来源：manual:cnc_common_faults.md
机床系统：攻丝加工中心
故障现象：刚性攻丝时断丝锥或螺纹质量差

【可能原因】
1. 主轴与 Z 轴同步误差大
2. 丝锥磨损或材质不匹配
3. 底孔直径不合适
4. 攻丝转速/进给比设置错误

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刚性攻丝相关参数
2. 测量底孔直径与丝锥规格
3. 观察攻丝过程扭矩曲线
4. 验证主轴编码器与 Z 轴跟随
5. 单孔试切评估螺纹规检测

【处理建议】
1. 校准刚性攻丝增益与同步
2. 选用合适丝锥并控制寿命
3. 修正底孔直径
4. 按推荐 F/S 比设置参数
5. 必要时改用啄攻或浮动攻丝

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10650
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2 incorrect gantry machine data, error code %3

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2 incorrect gantry machine data, error code %3
2. An incorrect value was entered in the gantry-specific axial machine data. Further information can be derived from the error number. - Error no. = 1 => either an incorrect gantry unit has been entered or the designation of the following axis is incorr
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10650 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Correct the machine data: MD 37100 GANTRY_AXIS_TYPE 0: No gantry axis 1: Master axis grouping 1 11: Slave axis grouping 1 2: Master axis grouping 2 12: Slave axis grouping 2 3: Master axis grouping 3 13: Slave axis grouping 3
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10261
故障现象：Channel %1 communication overload for block preparation

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 communication overload for block preparation
2. The internal communication between the NCK modules that evaluate the channel-specific VDI signals (START/STOP/RESET/DDTG/ASUBS/...) and the block preparation are overloaded. The block preparation modules are not being allocated enough computing time
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10261 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. More processor time must be allocated to the block preparation modules. Machine data $MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO or $MN_SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME can be increased for this purpose.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10777
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 tool radius compensation: too many blocks with

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 tool radius compensation: too many blocks with
2. The maximum permissible number of blocks with active compensation suppression with tool radius compensation is limited by the machine data CUTCOM_MAXNUM_SUPPR_BLOCKS.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end. NCK alarms 01/2008 Ove

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10777 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Modify part program. - Modify machine data. - Check whether SBL2 is activated. With SBL2, a block is generated from each part program line which can lead to exceeding the maximum permissible number of empty blocks between two traversing blocks.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

报警代码：PS86
故障现象：DR OFF

【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：DR OFF
2. During I/O process by reader/punch interface 1, the data set ready input signal of the I/O device (DR) was OFF. Possible causes are an I/O device not turn on, a broken cable, and a defective printed circuit board.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS86 或 CNC86
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

来源：manual:cnc_common_faults.md
机床系统：湿式切削加工中心
故障现象：冷却液泄漏，切削区域供液不足

【可能原因】
1. 冷却管路老化破裂
2. 水泵密封损坏
3. 过滤系统堵塞回流不畅
4. 液位开关误报

【排查步骤】
1. 检查管路接头与软管
2. 观察水泵运行声音与压力
3. 清理过滤网与排屑器
4. 校验液位传感器
5. 检查切削液浓度与变质情况

【处理建议】
1. 更换损坏管路或密封件
2. 修复/更换冷却泵
3. 定期清理过滤与排屑系统
4. 按标准浓度补充切削液
5. 泄漏区域做好防护与清理

来源：ai4i2020:RNF
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：无明显单一传感器趋势，间歇性异常停机
传感器特征：各传感器读数无明显规律，Machine failure 偶发

【可能原因】
1. 电气接触不良或信号干扰
2. 传感器偶发失效
3. 软件/PLC 逻辑边界条件触发

【排查步骤】
1. 调取故障前后报警与操作日志
2. 检查电缆屏蔽与接地
3. 对各传感器做交叉验证
4. 排查近期程序或参数变更

【处理建议】
1. 紧固接头并改善屏蔽
2. 更换可疑传感器
3. 回滚异常参数变更
4. 建立故障复现记录便于根因分析

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 axis %3 reaches the coordinate system-specific
2. The specified axis violates the coordinate system-specific working area limitation. This is not detected until the main run, either because the minimum axis values could not be determined before the transformation or because there is an overlaid mov
3. 系统反应：Local alarm reaction. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10632 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Program other motion or do not perform overlaid motion.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10732
故障现象：Channel %1 block %5 axis %2 working area limitation violated, residual

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %5 axis %2 working area limitation violated, residual
2. This alarm is generated if it is determined during block preparation that the programmed path of the stated axis violates the working area limitation. This alarm is issued instead of alarm 10730 if bit 11=1 in machine data $MN_ENABLE_ALARM_MASK. Alar
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10732 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. a) Check NC program for correct positional data and, if necessary, make corrections. b) Check zero offsets (current frame) c) Correct working area limitation via G25/G26, or d) Correct working area limitation via setting data, or e) Deactivate working area limitation via setting data 43410 WORKAREA_
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：6422
故障现象：Channel %1 tool move not possible. Magazine no. %2 not available.

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 tool move not possible. Magazine no. %2 not available.
2. The desired tool motion command - triggered from the MMC or PLC - is not possible. The magazine with the specified number is not available.
3. 系统反应：NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 6422 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Check whether the magazine data have been defined correctly. - If the PLC issued the command for motion: check whether the PLC program is correct. - If the MMC issued the command for motion: check whether the MMC command was assigned correct parameters.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

机床系统：FANUC CNC
报警代码：PS1595
故障现象：ILL-COMMAND

【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：ILL-COMMAND
2. IN EGB MODE M During synchronization with the EGB, a command that must not be issued is issued. 1) Slave axis command using G 27, G28, G29, G30, G33, G53, etc. 2) Inch/metric conversion command using G20, G21, etc.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS1595 或 CNC1595
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10762
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 too many empty blocks between two traversing

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 too many empty blocks between two traversing
2. The maximum permissible number of empty blocks is limited by a machine data.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10762 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Modify part program - Modify machine data - Check whether SBL2 is activated. With SBL2, a block is generated from each part program line which can lead to exceeding the maximum permissible number of empty blocks between two traversing blocks.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：4000
故障现象：Channel %1 machine data %2[%3] has gap in axis assignment

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 machine data %2[%3] has gap in axis assignment
2. The assignment of a machine axis to a channel by the machine data 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED must be contiguous. At system power-up (Power On) gaps are detected and displayed as an alarm.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4000 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The entries for the indices for the machine axes used in the channels must be contiguous in table $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED. Channel axis gaps must be enabled via $MN_ENABLE_CHAN_AX_GAP.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10759
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 path is parallel to tool orientation

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 path is parallel to tool orientation
2. In a block with spline or polynomial interpolation, the corrected path runs in at least one point parallel to the tool orientation, i.e. the path has a tangent perpendicular to the compensation plane. The tangent at a point on a path is regarded as p
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10759 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Do not use splines or polynomials when writing the contour section, but straight lines and circles instead. Divide up the tool piece geometry and deselect the cutter radius compensation between the various sections.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

故障现象：ILLEGAL

【可能原因】
1. 报警含义：ILLEGAL
2. PLANE SELECTED M The coordinate rotation plane and arc or cutter compensation plane must be the same. Modify the program. B-64305EN/03 APPENDIX A.ALARM LIST

【排查步骤】
1. 在 FANUC 诊断界面确认报警号 PS144 或 CNC144
2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics

报警代码：2102
故障现象：NCK battery alarm

【可能原因】
1. NCK battery alarm
2. The undervoltage monitoring (2.4 - 2.6 V) of the NCK battery was detected during system power-up.
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. The NC switches to follow-up mode. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Sto

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 2102 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Pull out the battery/fan unit from the NC module and replace the battery (type: lithium battery with lead, size 1/2 AA, 850 mAh, min. 3.2 V). The system must then be reinitialized because it must be assumed that data has been lost in the buf
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：10747
故障现象：Channel %1 block %2 retraction direction not defined for WAB

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 block %2 retraction direction not defined for WAB
2. In a WAB retraction block with quarter circle or semi-circle (G248 or G348), the end point in the machining plane was not programmed, and either G143 or G140 without tool radius compensation is active.
3. 系统反应：Correction block is reorganized. Local alarm reaction. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm at block end.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10747 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Modify part program. The following changes are possible: - Indicate end point in the machining plane in the WAB block. - Activate tool radius compensation (effective for G140 only, not for G143). - State retraction side explicitly with G141 or G142. - Perform retraction with a straight line instead 
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：manual:cnc_common_faults.md
机床系统：配自动换刀装置的加工中心
故障现象：换刀失败，刀库卡刀或主轴松刀异常

【可能原因】
1. 刀库定位传感器偏移
2. 主轴松刀缸压力不足
3. 换刀宏程序或 M 代码时序错误
4. 刀柄拉钉磨损或锥孔污染

【排查步骤】
1. 检查刀库零点与刀套位置传感器
2. 测量松刀缸气压/油压
3. 单步执行换刀程序观察各步动作
4. 检查主轴锥孔与刀柄清洁度
5. 查看 PMC 换刀相关信号时序

【处理建议】
1. 重新调整刀库定位与传感器
2. 修复气/液压回路泄漏
3. 修正换刀程序参数与时序
4. 清洁锥面，更换拉钉
5. 低速空换刀验证后恢复生产

2. 记录报警发生时的程序段与操作模式
3. 查阅 FANUC 维修手册对应章节
4. 检查与该报警相关的硬件与参数

【处理建议】
1. 按手册描述逐项排除故障原因
2. 修复后执行报警复位（RESET）
3. 空运转验证各轴与主轴动作正常
4. 恢复加工前做首件确认

4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：manual:cnc_common_faults.md
机床系统：Siemens 840D / FANUC
故障现象：系统启动失败，HMI 黑屏或卡在启动画面

【可能原因】
1. NC 或 PCU 硬件故障
2. 系统电池电量耗尽致参数丢失
3. 软件/固件损坏
4. 总线通信中断

【排查步骤】
1. 检查 NC 与 HMI 电源指示灯
2. 测量系统电池电压
3. 查看启动日志与报警缓存
4. 检查总线接头与模块状态
5. 尝试上次已知良好备份恢复

【处理建议】
1. 更换 CMOS 电池并恢复参数
2. 重装或升级系统软件
3. 更换故障 NC/PCU 模块
4. 修复总线通信
5. 建立定期参数与 PLC 备份机制

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics

报警代码：1016
故障现象：Channel %1 axis %2 system error %3

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2 system error %3
2. With this alarm, internal alarm states are displayed that, in conjunction with the transferred error number, provide information on the cause and location of the error.
3. 系统反应：Mode group not ready. Local alarm reaction. Channel not ready. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 1016 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Make a note of the error text and contact Siemens AG A&D MC, Hotline (tel./fax: see alarm 1000)
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. - Buy option - Do not activate different Ipo or position control cycles (see MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO and MN_POSCTRL_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO).
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：manual:cnc_common_faults.md
机床系统：FANUC / Siemens 通用
故障现象：伺服驱动报警，某轴无法移动

【可能原因】
1. 伺服电机或驱动器故障
2. 编码器反馈信号异常
3. 机械卡死或过载触发保护
4. 电缆接头松动或屏蔽不良

【排查步骤】
1. 记录驱动器报警子代码
2. 检查电机接线与编码器插头
3. 手动松抱闸检查机械是否卡滞
4. 查看负载电流与跟随误差
5. 交换驱动器/电机做对比测试

【处理建议】
1. 根据子代码查手册定位故障模块
2. 紧固接头，更换损坏电缆
3. 排除机械干涉后复位报警
4. 修复或更换驱动器/电机/编码器
5. 重新校准零点与反向间隙

故障现象：Sign of life monitoring: local P-bus not alive

【可能原因】
1. Sign of life monitoring: local P-bus not alive

3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4290 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Check hardware.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

【可能原因】
1. Channel %1 axis %2 defined for more than one channel via machine data
2. In the channel-specific MD: 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED [CHn, AXm]=x (n ... channel number, m ... channel axis number, x ... machine axis number), several channels were assigned to a machine axis without having a master channel defined for this axis. -
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Mode group not ready, also effective for single axes NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop

1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 4001 详情

4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. In the axis-specific MD 30550 AXCONF_ASSIGN_MASTER_CHAN [AXm]=n (m ... machine axis number, n ... channel number), a master axis was set for the axes that are supposed to be alternately assigned by the NC program to one or the other channel.

3. 报警清除后重新回零验证

2. The channel has received a command. The command cannot be executed.
3. 系统反应：Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 10225 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. Press RESET. NCK alarms 01/2008
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：8101
故障现象：Option for collision avoidance is inadequate

【可能原因】
1. Option for collision avoidance is inadequate
2. The option stage is inadequate for the desired function. Possible reasons: 1. More 3D protection zones have been created than is possible. 2. A protection zone type was requested that is not permitted.
3. 系统反应：Interpreter stop NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 8101 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. 1. Buy an adequate option stage. 2. Reduce the number of 3D protection zones. 3. Avoid impermissible protection zone types.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：siemens_840d_diagnostics
机床系统：Siemens SINUMERIK 840D
报警代码：2196
故障现象：Link axis active and $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE != %1

【可能原因】
1. Link axis active and $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE != %1
2. Occurs only with an NCU link system. - Possible causes of the fault: - At least one axis is to be distributed via NCU link, then the machine data $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE must be 3 or 4. - The IPO cycle of this NCU is faster than the link communication
3. 系统反应：NC not ready. Channel not ready. NC Start disable in this channel. Interface signals are set. Alarm display. NC Stop on alarm.

【排查步骤】
1. 在 Siemens 操作面板查看 NCK 报警 2196 详情
2. 记录报警参数与当前加工状态
3. 查阅 840D 诊断手册对应条目
4. 检查相关轴/驱动/PLC 信号

【处理建议】
1. The machine data $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE must be set to the value proposed in the alarm.
2. 按手册 Remedy 说明执行修复
3. 报警清除后重新回零验证
4. 确认无后续报警后恢复生产

来源：ai4i2020:HDF:sensor
机床系统：预测性维护平台（ai4i2020）
故障现象：根据传感器数据判定异常类型
传感器特征：Process temperature [K] 偏高，Air/Process 温差缩小

【可能原因】
1. 冷却系统效率下降或堵塞
2. 环境通风不良
3. 长时间连续高负荷运行

【排查步骤】
1. 检查冷却泵、风扇与换热器运行
2. 清理冷却液管路和过滤网
3. 监测主轴与进给轴温升曲线
4. 检查车间环境温度与通风

【处理建议】
1. 修复冷却系统并补充冷却液
2. 清理散热通道
3. 合理安排间歇加工降低热负荷
4. 必要时检修换热器
