系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2000
消息：PLC sign-of-life monitoring
定义：The PLC must give a sign of life within a defined period of time (machine data 10100 PLC_CYCLIC_TIMEOUT). If this does not occur, the alarm is triggered. The sign of life is a counter reading on the internal NC/PLC interface which the PLC causes to count up with the 10 ms time alarm. The NCK also tests cyclically whether the counter reading has changed.
处理：

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2001
消息：PLC has not started up
定义：The PLC must give at least 1 sign of life within a period of time defined in MD 10120 PLC_RUNNINGUP_TIMEOUT (Default setting: 1 sec.).
处理：- Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The monitoring time in in MD 10120 PLC_RUNNINGUP_TIMEOUT must be checked and adapted to the first OB1 cycle. - Establish the cause of error in the PLC (loop or stop in the user program) and eliminate.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2100
消息：NCK battery warning threshold reached
定义：The undervoltage monitor of the NCK battery has reached the prewarning threshold. This is at 2.7-2.9 V (nominal voltage of the battery is 3.0-3.1 V at 950 mAh).
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The battery must be replaced within the next 6 weeks. After this period, the voltage can drop below the alarm limit of 2.4-2.6 V if the RAMs to be buffered take up a lot of current.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2101
消息：NCK battery alarm
定义：The undervoltage monitoring (2.4 - 2.6 V) of the NCK battery has responded during cyclic operation.
处理：If the NCK battery is replaced without interrupting the power supply, no data will be lost. This means that production can continue without taking any further steps. (A buffer capacitor on the NCK holds the supply voltage for at least 30 minutes and the battery can be replaced within this time even when the control is switched off).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2102
消息：NCK battery alarm
定义：The undervoltage monitoring (2.4 - 2.6 V) of the NCK battery was detected during system power-up.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Pull out the battery/fan unit from the NC module and replace the battery (type: lithium battery with lead, size 1/2 AA, 850 mAh, min. 3.2 V). The system must then be reinitialized because it must be assumed that data has been lost in the buffered RAM during the last power-off phase as a result of insufficient supply voltage (refer to Section 2.2 in the Installation and Start-up Guide for the procedure). The following data might have bee

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2110
消息：NCK temperature alarm
定义：The temperature sensor has reached the response threshold of 60 degrees C +/- 2.5 degrees C.
处理：In order to reset the sensor, the temperature must be reduced by 7 degrees C.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2120
消息：NCK fan alarm
定义：The fan consists of a 26 V DC motor with electronic commutator (rated speed: approx. 8700 rpm). The commutator signal is used for speed monitoring, response speed: < 7500 rpm.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The unit with the fan and NCK battery must be replaced.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2140
消息：The actual service switch position forces the SRAM to be cleared at the
定义：The initialization switch is currently set to overall reset. This means that the module's SRAM is deleted with the next module reset. The NC data memory is cleared during this operation.
处理：Reset initialization switch to zero.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2190
消息：Hardware plug-in module for communication with the digitizer missing
定义：MD $MN_ASSIGN_DIGITIZE_TO_CHAN was used to activate the digitizing function by assigning it to a channel. The function requires a hardware module (RS422 board plugged into the NCU) for communication with the digitizing unit. This module was not found when booting.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Plug in communications module or cancel channel assignment.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2192
消息：No NCU link module exists, MD %1 reset
定义：An attempt was made to activate the NCU link functionality but the hardware is not available. The MD was reset. Only occurs with the NCU link system
处理：Install the hardware module and activate the function again (MD).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2194
消息：Link axis active and $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE != 3
定义：At least one axis is to be distributed via NCU link, then the machine data $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE must be 3. Occurs only with an NCU link system.
处理：Set $MN_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE to 3.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2195
消息：Channel %1 axis %2 high-speed punching/nibbling not possible via link
定义：An attempt was made to activate high-speed nibbling or punching for an axis programmed on a different NCU than the drive.
处理：High-speed nibbling and punching is only supported on one NCU.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2196
消息：Link axis active and $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE != %1
定义：Occurs only with an NCU link system. - Possible causes of the fault: - At least one axis is to be distributed via NCU link, then the machine data $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE must be 3 or 4. - The IPO cycle of this NCU is faster than the link communication cycle, then the machine data $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE must be set to the value proposed in the alarm.
处理：The machine data $MN_MM_SERVO_FIFO_SIZE must be set to the value proposed in the alarm.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2200
消息：Channel %1 fast punching/nibbling not possible in several channels
定义：An attempt was made to activate fast nibbling or punching in a channel while it has already been active in another channel. Fast punching and nibbling is only possible simultaneously in the same channel.
处理：Fast nibbling and punching simultaneously in 1 channel only.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：2900
消息：Reboot is delayed
定义：This alarm indicates a delayed reboot. This alarm only occurs when reboot was carried out by the MMC via PI - "_N_IBN_SS"and MD 11410 $MN_REBOOT_DELAY_TIME was set greater than zero. The alarm can be suppressed with $MN_SUPPRESS_ALARM_MASK BIT 20.
处理：See $MN_REBOOT_DELAY_TIME and $MN_SUPPRESS_ALARM_MASK.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：3000
消息：Emergency stop
定义：The EMERGENCY STOP request is applied to the NCK/PLC interface DB10 DBX56.1 (Emergency stop).
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Rectify the cause of EMERGENCY STOP, and acknowledge EMERGENCY STOP via the PLC/NCK interface DB10 DBX56.1 (Emergency stop).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：3001
消息：Internal emergency stop
定义：This alarm is not displayed.
处理：No remedy required

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4000
消息：Channel %1 machine data %2[%3] has gap in axis assignment
定义：The assignment of a machine axis to a channel by the machine data 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED must be contiguous. At system power-up (Power On) gaps are detected and displayed as an alarm.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The entries for the indices for the machine axes used in the channels must be contiguous in table $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED. Channel axis gaps must be enabled via $MN_ENABLE_CHAN_AX_GAP.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4001
消息：Channel %1 axis %2 defined for more than one channel via machine data
定义：In the channel-specific MD: 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED [CHn, AXm]=x (n ... channel number, m ... channel axis number, x ... machine axis number), several channels were assigned to a machine axis without having a master channel defined for this axis. -
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. In the axis-specific MD 30550 AXCONF_ASSIGN_MASTER_CHAN [AXm]=n (m ... machine axis number, n ... channel number), a master axis was set for the axes that are supposed to be alternately assigned by the NC program to one or the other channel.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：20070
消息：AXCONF_MACHAX_USED [kx]=m may be declared as geometry axes or transformation axes
定义：AXCONF_MACHAX_USED [kx]=m may be declared as geometry axes or transformation axes
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Check and correct either - $MC_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB - $MC_TRAFO_AXES_IN_X - $MC_TRAFO_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB_X - $MC_FGROUP_DEFAULT_AXES - and/or $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4003
消息：Axis %1 incorrect assignment of master channel in machine data %2
定义：For some applications, it is useful to operate an axis in several channels (C axis or spindle on single spindle or double carriage machines). The machine axes which are defined through the channel-specific MD 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED in several channels, must be assigned to a master channel with the axisspecific MD 30550 AXCONF_ASSIGN_MASTER_CHAN. For axes that are activated in one channel only, the number of this channel or zero must be entered as a master channel.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Modify MD 20070: AXCONF_MACHAX_USED and/or MD 30550: AXCONF_ASSIGN_MASTER_CHAN.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4004
消息：Channel %1 machine data %2 axis %3 defined repeatedly as geometry
定义：An axis may only be defined once as a geometry axis.
处理：Correct $MC_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4005
消息：Channel %1: maximum number of axes in channel %1 exceeded. Limit
定义：Machine data $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED defines which machine axes can be used in this channel. This simultaneously defines the number of active axes in the channel. This upper limit has been exceeded. Note: The channel axis gaps may cause certain indices of AXCONF_MACHAX_USED to remain unused and therefore do not count as active channel axes. Example: - CHANDATA(2) - $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED[0] = 7 - $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED[1] = 8 - $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED[2] = 0 - $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED[3] = 3 - $MC_A
处理：Modify $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4006
消息：The maximum number of activatable axes has been exceeded (limit %1)
定义：The sum of the two option data $ON_NUM_AXES_IN_SYSTEM and $ON_NUM_ADD_AXES_IN_SYSTEM must not exceed the maximum number of axes in the system.
处理：Please inform the authorized personel/service department. The sum of the two option data $ON_NUM_AXES_IN_SYSTEM and $ON_NUM_ADD_AXES_IN_SYSTEM must not exceed the maximum number of axes (dependent on configuration).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4007
消息：Axis %1 incorrect assignment of master NCU in machine data %2
定义：Machine axes which can be activated on several NCKs through $MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB must be assigned to a master NCU in $MA_AXCONF_ASSIGN_MASTER_NCU. For axes that are activated on only one NCU, the number of this NCU or 0 must be entered as master NCU. An assignment can only be made with $MA_AXCONF_ASSIGN_MASTER_NCU if the machine axis is also addressed via a channel ($MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED+$MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB).
处理：Correct $MA_AXCONF_ASSIGN_MASTER_NCU and/or $MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4010
消息：Invalid identifier used in machine data %1[%2]
定义：When determining a name in the NCK tables (arrays) for: machine axes, Euler angles, direction vectors, normal vectors, interpolation parameters and intermediate point coordinates, one of the following syntax rules for the identifier to be entered has been violated: - The identifier must be an NC address letter (A, B, C, I, J, K, Q, U, V, W, X, Y, Z), possibly with a numerical extension (840D: 1-99) - The identifier must begin with any 2 capital letters but not with $ (reserved for system variab
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Enter the identifier for user-defined names with correct syntax in the displayed MD. - Machine axes: AXCONF_MACHAX_NAME_TAB - Euler angles: EULER_ANGLE_NAME_TAB - Normal vectors: NORMAL_VECTOR_NAME_TAB - Direction vectors: 10640 DIR_VECTOR_NAME_TAB - Interpolation parameters: 10650 IPO_PARAM_NAME_TAB - Intermediate point coordinates: 10660 INTERMEDIATE_POINT_NAME_TAB

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4011
消息：Channel %1 invalid identifier used in machine data %2[%3]
定义：When defining names in the channel-specific tables for geometry axes and channel axes, one of the following syntax rules for the identifier to be entered has been violated: - The identifier must be an NC address letter (A, B, C, I, J, K, U, V, W, X, Y, Z), possibly with a numerical extension (840D: 1-99). - The identifier must begin with any 2 capital letters but not with $ (reserved for system variables). - The identifier must not be a keyword of the NC language (e.g. POSA).
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Enter the identifier for user-defined names with correct syntax in the displayed MD - Geometry axes: 20060 AXCONF_GEOAX_NAME_TAB - Channel axes: 10000 AXCONF_MACHAX_NAME_TAB

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4012
消息：Invalid identifier used in machine data %1[%2]
定义：The selected identifier is invalid. Valid identifiers are: - AX1 - AXn: Machine axis identifiers - N1AX1 - NnAXm: Link axis identifiers (NCU + machine axis), only occurs with 'NCU link' expansion level! - C1S1 - CnSm: Container axis identifiers (container + container location). Only occurs with 'axis container' expansion level!
处理：Use the correct identifier.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4013
消息：Invalid NCU link configuration by machine data %1 = %2 , on NCU_1 = %3
定义：The link module configuration detected on the local NCU is different from the master NCU of the NCU cluster. The link module configuration defines the system clock time, the communication baudrate and the maximum number of message transfer retries. The following machine data are used for this purpose: - SYSCLOCK_SAMPL_TIME_RATIO, - IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO, - LINK_RETRY_CTR, - LINK_BAUDRATE_SWITCH, - SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME The values of these machine data must be the same on all NCUs.
处理：The machine data required for the link module configuration must be the same on all NCUs in the cluster.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4014
消息：Axis %1 defined several times in %2
定义：An axis was assigned several times. The axis can be a: - Machine axis - Link axis - Axis in a container location
处理：Define a correct, unique axis assignment.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4016
消息：Axis %1 already used by NCU %2
定义：An attempt was made to apply setpoints to one axis from several NCUs. Only occurs with the NCU link system
处理：Define a correct, unique axis assignment.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4017
消息：Axis container %1, location %2 already used by NCU %3
定义：A multiple reference to the axis container location has been made via the logical axis table (machine data: MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB). With the NCU link, the multiple reference may also have been made by another NCU in the NCU group. Example: Container1 location1 was referenced twice incorrectly - MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB[0] = CT1_SL1 - MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB[6] = CT1_SL1
处理：Correct and complete the container location assignments. Check the machine data for the logical axis assignment table (MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB)

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4018
消息：Axis container %1, location %2 not used by any channel
定义：The container location is not referenced by any channel.
处理：Correct and complete the container location assignments. Check machine data MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED and MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4019
消息：Axis container %1 advance not allowed with current status of NCU %2
定义：This error only occurs with direct advancing of the container. With direct container advancing, only one channel is allowed to activate the NC language command for advancing the container. In order to ensure this, the other channels must have the reset status and the axes must be stationary. With NCU link, the above condition applies to all channels of the NCU group. Error parameters: - 1 : NC Ready missing - 16: At least one other channel is active - 35: AXCT axis is active following axis/spind
处理：The program must be canceled with Reset and the zero offset deselected before activating the axis container switch.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4020
消息：Identifier %1 used several times in machine data %2
定义：When determining a name in the NCK tables (arrays) for: machine axes, Euler angles, Richtungsvektoren, direction vectors, interpolation parameters and intermediate point coordinates, an identifier has been used that is already in the control.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Select for the identifier to be entered a character string that is not yet used in the system (max. 32 characters).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4021
消息：Channel %1 identifier %2 used several times in machine data %3
定义：To determine the name in the channel-specific tables for geometry axes and channel axes an identifier already existing in the control has been used.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Select for the identifier to be entered a character string that is not yet used in the system (max. 32 characters).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4022
消息：Channel %1 axis %2: axis container %3 switch not allowed: ext. work
定义：The axis container switch enable cannot be given because an external zero offset is active.
处理：The program must be aborted with the RESET key and the external zero point offset deselected before the container is advanced.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4023
消息：Axis container %1 switch not allowed, axis container %2 switch active
定义：Only one axis container can be rotated at a time.
处理：Program must be canceled with Reset and the program sequences (NCUs, channels) must be synchronized such that only one axis container switch is active at a time.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4024
消息：Invalid axis configuration due to missing axis container machine data
定义：The axis configuration could not be generated due to missing axis container machine data. This error can only occur as a result of a communication error. The communication failure will be indicated separately by further alarms.
处理：Correct the link communication problems (refer to the other alarm messages).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4025
消息：Channel %1 axis %2: axis container %3 switch not allowed: master/slave
定义：It is not possible to enable axis container switch as a master/slave link is active.
处理：Abort program with the RESET key. If required, disconnect the master - slave coupling.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4026
消息：Machine data %1[%2], link axis NC%3_AX%4 not used by any channel
定义：The link axis is not referenced by any channel.
处理：Correct and complete the logical axis assignments. Check machine data MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED and MN_AXCONF_LOGIC_MACHAX_TAB.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4027
消息：NOTICE! MD %1 was also changed for the other axes of axis container
定义：Message to the user indicating that the machine data change for the axis was also performed for all other axes in the same container.
处理：

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4028
消息：Attention! The axial MDs of the axes of the axis containers were
定义：Note for the user, that the machine data of the axis were matched in the axis containers.
处理：

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4029
消息：NOTICE! The axial MDs in axis container %1 will be matched on the next
定义：Message to the user indicating that the machine data of the axes in the axis container will be matched on the next power-up. An axis container allows axes to be exchanged between channels and NCUs. To ensure that no conflicts arise, the axes within the same axis container must have a similar behavior. The first axis in the axis container determines which machine data have to be the same for the other axis in the axis container.
处理：

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4031
消息：Channel %1 link axis %2 defined for more than one channel in machine
定义：-
处理：Correct the machine data $MC_AXCONF_MACHAX_USED or assign a master channel. In the event of a link communication failure, these error causes have to be remedied first.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4032
消息：Channel %1 wrong identifier for facing axis in %2
定义：According to the axis configuration in $MC_GCODE_RESET_VALUES or $MC_DIAMETER_AX_DEF, a facing axis identifier is expected at the specified location.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Add the correct identifier.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4033
消息：NOTICE! NCU link communication still not connected
定义：The NCU link communication could not be established due to other active alarms. This is the case, for example, if during boot-up the system detects and modifies incorrect cycle times (see alarm 4110).
处理：Analyze and fix the other alarms and start the control again.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4034
消息：Local link axis %1 is not allowed for different interpolation cycle time =
定义：Local link axes are only permissible on an NCU if the interpolation cycle set corresponds to the slowest interpolation cycle of the interconnected NCU systems.
处理：Remove local link axis (see MN_AXCONF_MACHAX_NAME_TAB and MN_AXCT_AXCONF_ASSIGN_TAB1) or adapt the interpolation cycle (MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4035
消息：Interpolation cycle from NCU%1 = %2 does not match NCU%3 = %4
定义：Occurs only with an NCU link system. The interpolation cycles of the NCUs specified in the alarm do not match one another. The slowest IPO cycle in interconnected NCU systems must be an integral multiple of all configured IPO cycles.
处理：Set a suitable value in MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO for all interconnected NCUs.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4036
消息：Wrong NCU link configuration by MD %1
定义：Occurs only with an NCU link system. Different interpolation and position control cycles have been set in the NCUs of the LINK group. This is only allowed if the function FAST-IPO-LINK in MD $MN_MM_NCU_LINK_MASK has been activated. Caution: For diagnostic purposes, two additional alarm parameters are output together with this alarm. - 1. 2nd parameter: Position control or IPO cycle time of this NCU - 2. 2nd parameter: Position control or IPO cycle time of another NCU.
处理：- Activate FAST-IPO-LINK function in MN_MM_NCU_LINK_MASK - Or do not set different position control or IPO cycles on the NCUs (see MN_IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO and MN_POSCTRL_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4040
消息：Channel %1 axis identifier %2 not consistent with machine data %3
定义：The use of the specified axis identifier in the displayed MD is not consistent the channel's axis configuration stated in the MD 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED and MD 20050 AXCONF_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB. Only with active "OEM transformation" compile cycle: There are not enough channel axes entered in the MD displayed.
处理：

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4045
消息：Channel %1 conflict between machine data %2 and machine data %3
定义：Using the specified machine data %1 leads to a conflict with machine data %2.
处理：Correct the specified machine data.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4050
消息：NC code identifier %1 cannot be reconfigured to %2
定义：Renaming of an NC code was not possible for one of the following reasons: - The old identifier does not exist - The new identifier is within one type range. NC codes/keywords can be reconfigured as long as you stay within the type range. Type 1: "true" G codes: G02, G17, G33, G64, ... Type 2: named G codes: ASPLINE, BRISK, TRANS, ... Type 3: settable addresses: X, Y, A1, A2, I, J, K, ALF, MEAS, ...
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Correct machine data 10712: NC_USER_CODE_CONF_NAME_TAB (protection level 1). The list must be built up as follows: Even address: Identifier to be modified Following odd address: New identifier e.g.: NC_USER_CODE_CONF_NAME_TAB [10] = "ROT", NC_USER_CODE_CONF_NAME_TAB [11] = " " clears the ROT function from the control

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4060
消息：Standard machine data loaded (%1, %2)
定义：The standard MD were loaded because - a cold start was requested or - the MD buffer voltage failed or - an initialization was requested for loading the standard machine data (MD 11200 INIT_MD).
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. After automatically loading the standard MDs, the individual MDs must be entered or loaded in the relevant system.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4062
消息：Backup data loaded
定义：The user data saved in the flash memory are loaded to the SRAM.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Load specific machine data again.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4065
消息：Buffered memory was restored from backup medium (potential loss of
定义：Only occurs with SINUMERIK 840D / 840Di sl / 802D. !! 840Di sl only The user data of the NC and the remanent data of the PLC are stored in the static memory area (SRAM) of the MCI board. The content of the SRAM is backed up as an SRAM image on PCU hard disk at each "NCK POWER ON reset" and each time Windows XP is closed down normally. The previously valid SRAM image then becomes the SRAM backup, which is also stored on the PCU hard disk. The SRAM backup is used and alarm 4065 issued in the foll
处理：Make a POWER ON reset. !! 840Di / 840Di sl only: Alarm 4065 also has to be acknowledged on the HMI after a POWER ON reset: HMI: Operating area switchover > Diagnostics > NC/PLC Diagnostics > Diagnostics > "Acknowledge alarm 4065" button Note Press the "ETC" key to change to the secondary softkey bar in order to acknowledge the alarm with a softkey.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4066
消息：Buffered memory of FFS restored from backup medium (potential loss of
定义：For 840Di: A possible data integrity error was detected in the FFS memory during power-up. The FFS memory was initialized with the last backup copy. Changes in the FFS memory, which have been made since the last backup copy update, have been lost. !! For 840Di only: Backup copies of the buffered memory are updated (on the hard disk) every time the control is shut down normally.
处理：Start the control again.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：10230
消息：SCALING_FACTORS USER_DEF[n] (n ... index number 0 - 10), when the corresponding
定义：SCALING_FACTORS USER_DEF[n] (n ... index number 0 - 10), when the corresponding
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. If the alarm has been displayed after downloading an MD file which is consistent within itself, then the download operation must be repeated with a new NCK power-up. (The file contains scaling-dependent machine data in front of the scaling factors).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4071
消息：Check the position of the encoder
定义：A machine data has been changed that affects the value of an absolute encoder position. Please check the postion values. For absolute value encoders: Encoder adjustment has been changed, the machine reference of the axis position may have changed, check the encoder adjustment. Other encoders: The reference point of the axis position has been changed, check the referencing procedure.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4073
消息：Compile cycle functions define machine data number %1 several times
定义：Can only occur when installing compile cycle functions. Two different compile cycle applications use the same machine data number. The machine data which was defined twice is shifted into the free number range above 64000.
处理：The error has no effect on the usability of the machine data and the function of the compile cycle application. To ensure that the compile cycle machine data documentation is correct, you must contact the supplier of the compile cycle. Only the supplier can remedy the error by changing the software.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4075
消息：Machine data %1 (and maybe others) not changed due to missing
定义：On executing a TOA file or when writing data from the part program, an attempt has been made to write an item of data with a higher protection level than the access authorization currently set in the control. The item of data in question has not been written and program execution is continued. This alarm is set only when access violation is detected for the first time.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Set the required access level by means of keyswitch or password entry or delete the machine data concerned from the MD file/part program.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4077
消息：New value %1 of MD %2 not set. Requested %3 bytes too much %4
定义：An attempt was made to enter a new value in the specified memory configuration machine data. It was not possible to modify the value, as this would have cleared the contents of the user memory. This was because the memory requested exceeded the available capacity. The third parameter specifies the number of bytes by which the maximum user memory was exceeded. The fourth parameter specifies the type of memory whose limit was exceeded. - "D" stands for dynamic or non-buffered user memory (this is
处理：If the modification was unintentional, ignore the error message and continue. The alarm has no negative effects. The remedy depends on the access rights and the current memory configuration of the NCK. - The intended change is not possible -> try again with a smaller value. Observe the change in the number of bytes. - Buy more memory? This option depends on the model in use. (Not possible if parameter 4 equals "iS"). - The NCK user memory may have been set smaller than it could be. The machine

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4080
消息：Incorrect configuration of indexing axis in MD %1
定义：The assignment of a position table to an indexing axis or the contents of a position table contains an error, or the length of a position table has been parameterized with 0.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. 3 MD identifiers are output, depending on the type of error. 1. $MA_INDEX_AX_ASSIGN_TAB (axis-specific MD 30500: The error is due to multiple assignment of a position table (NCK MD 10910/10930 INDEX_AX_POS_TAB_n) to axes with different types (linear/rotary axis). 2. $MN_INDEX_AX_POS_TAB_n (NCK MD 10910/10930): The contents of the displayed table n contain an error. - The entered positions must be arranged in increasing size. - A partic

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4090
消息：Too many errors during power-up
定义：More than errors occurred during control power-up.
处理：Set the machine data correctly.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：10050
消息：SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME, the programmable hardware divider 1 has been readjusted in
定义：SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME, the programmable hardware divider 1 has been readjusted in
处理：No remedial measures are required. The alarm display can be canceled with Reset.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4101
消息：Position control cycle for digital drive reduced to %1 ms
定义：For SIMODRIVE 611D only: The position control clock divisor in the NCK MD 10060 POSCTRL_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO was set so that a position control cycle time of more than 16ms resulted. The limit value for the drive actuator SIMODRIVE 611D is however 16ms.
处理：No remedial measures are required. The alarm display is canceled with Reset.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4102
消息：Default values for drive cycle times differ
定义：For SIMODRIVE 611D and SINUMERIK 810D only: External control modules of the SIMODRIVE 611D bus and the controls within the CCU3 module have different default values for the cycle times of the current and speed control loops.
处理：External control modules of the SIMODRIVE611D bus and the controls within the CCU3 module have different default values for the current and speed control cycle times. Check the specified values and modify accordingly (see MD_CURRCTRL_CYCLE_TIME and MD_SPEEDCTRL_CYCLE_TIME).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4110
消息：IPO cycle changed to %1 ms
定义：The IPO cycle divisor was set to a value which was not an integral multiple of the position control cycle divisor. The divisor (MD 10070 IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO) was increased. For PROFIBUS/PROFINET: MD 10070 IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO has been modified because of the modified DP cycle in the SDB (MD 10050 SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME).
处理：Machine data 10070 IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO has been modified.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4111
消息：PLC cycle increased to %1 ms
定义：The PLC cycle divisor was set to a value which was not an integral multiple of the IPO cycle divisor. The divisor (MD 10074 PLC_IPO_TIME_RATIO ) has been increased. For PROFIBUS/PROFINET: MD 10074 PLC_IPO_TIME_RATIO has been modified because of the modified DP cycle in the SDB (MD 10050 SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME).
处理：Machine data 10074 PLC_IPO_TIME_RATIO has been modified.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4112
消息：Servo cycle changed to %1 ms
定义：For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: MD 10060 POSCTRL_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO has been modified because of the modified DP cycle in the SDB (10050 SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME).
处理：Machine data 10060 POSCTRL_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO RATIO has been modified.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4113
消息：Sysclock cycle changed to %1 ms
定义：For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: MD 10050 SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME has been modified because of the modified DP cycle in the SDB.
处理：Machine data 10050 SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME has been modified.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4114
消息：Error in DP cycle of the SDB
定义：For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: The DP cycle in the SDB contains an error and cannot be set. The default value of $MN_SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME is set.
处理：Correct the SDB

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4115
消息：Time ratio communication to Ipo changed to %1
定义：The value of the machine data 10072 has been adapted. This can only occur, if the value of the machine data is smaller than one and the time thus calculated is no multiple of the position control cycle.
处理：The machine data $MN_COM_IPO_TIME_RATIO has been adapted. Please check to ensure that the calculated value is correct.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4150
消息：Channel %1 invalid M function subprogram call configured
定义：The machine data $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE[n] or $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE_PAR contains invalid configration data: An M function, which is used by the system and can not be replaced by a subprogram call has been specified in the machine data $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE[n] for the configuration of the subprogram call via M function: - M0 to M5, - M17, M30, - M19, M40 to M45, - M function for selecting spindle/axis mode according to $MC_SPIND_RIGID_TAPPING_M_NR (default: M70), - M functions for nibbling/punching as con
处理：Configure an M function in the machine data $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE[n] that is not assigned by the system, or configure a permissible array index in the machine data $MN_M_NO_FCT_CYCLE_PAR.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4152
消息：Illegal configuration of the 'Block display with absolute values' function
定义：The "Block display with absolute values" function has been illegally parameterized: - An illegal block length has been set with $MC_MM_ABSBLOCK: While ramping up, the machine data will be checked for the following value range: 0, 1, 128 to 512 - An invalid display range has been set with $MC_MM_ABSBLOCK_BUFFER_CONF[]. While ramping up, the machine data will be checked for the following upper and lower limits: - 0 <= $MC_MM_ABSBLOCK_BUFFER_CONF[0] <= 8 - 0 <= $MC_MM_ABSBLOCK_BUFFER_CONF[1] <= ($M
处理：Configure block length/display range within the permissible limits.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4160
消息：Channel %1 invalid M function number configured for spindle switchover
定义：An M function was specified in machine data $MC_SPIND_RIGID_TAPPING_M_NR in order to configure the M function number for spindle switchover. The M function number is assigned by the system and cannot be used for the switchover (M1 to M5, M17, M30, M40 to M45).
处理：(M1 to M5, M17, M30, M40 to M45). Configure an M function which is not used by the system (M1 to M5, M17, M30, M40 to M45) in machine data $MC_SPIND_RIGID_TAPPING_M_NR.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4170
消息：Invalid M function number for channel synchronisation assigned
定义：An M number between 0 and 99 has been specified In machine data $MN_EXTERN_CHAN_SYNC_M_NR_MIN or $MN_EXTERN_CHAN_SYNC_M_NR_MAX for the configuration of the M number range for channel synchronization in ISO2/3 mode or the machine data $MN_EXTERN_CHAN_SYNC_M_NR_MAX is smaller than $MN_EXTERN_CHAN_SYNC_M_NR_MIN.
处理：Check machine data $MN_EXTERN_CHAN_SYNC_M_NR_MIN and $MN_EXTERN_CHAN_SYNC_M_NR_MAX.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4180
消息：Invalid M function number assigned to enable ASUP
定义：An invalid M function number has been assigned for activation of ASUP. An illegal M number has been assigned in machine data $MN_EXTERN_M_NO_SET_INT or $MN_EXTERN_M_NO_DISABLE_INT for the configuration of the M number range for activation/deactivation of the interrupt program.
处理：Check machine data $MN_EXTERN_M_NO_SET_INT and $MN_EXTERN_M_NO_DISABLE_INT.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4181
消息：Channel %1 invalid assignment of an M auxiliary function number
定义：In machine data $MC_AUXFU_ASSOC_M0_VALUE or $MC_AUXFU_ASSOC_M1_VALUE, a number has been specified for the configuration of a new predefined M function which is occupied by the system, and cannot be used for an assignment. (M0 to M5, M17, M30, M40 to M45).
处理：Configure an M function in machine data $MC_AUXFU_ASSOC_M0_VALUE or $MC_AUXFU_ASSOC_M1_VALUE which is not occupied by the system (M1 to M5, M17, M30, M40 to M45).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4182
消息：Channel %1 invalid M auxiliary function number in %2%3, MD reset
定义：In the specified machine data, a number has been specified for the configuration of an M function which is occupied by the system, and cannot be used for an assignment. (M0 to M5, M17, M30, M40 to M45 and also M98, M99 with applied ISO dialect). The value set by the user has been reset to the default value by the system.
处理：Configure an M function in the specified machine data which is not occupied by the system (M0 to M5, M17, M30, M40 to M45 and also M98, M99 with applied ISO dialect).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4183
消息：Channel %1 M auxiliary function number %2 used several times (%3 and
定义：In the specified machine data, a number has been used several times for the configuration of an M function.
处理：Check the specified machine data and create a unique assignment of M auxiliary function numbers.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4184
消息：Channel %1 illegally predefined auxiliary function in %2%3, MD reset
定义：In the specified machine data, a predefined auxiliary function has been illegally configured. The value set by the user has been reset to the default value by the system.
处理：Configure a valid value in the specified machine data.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4185
消息：Channel %1 illegal auxiliary function configured %2 %3 %4
定义：An auxiliary function has been illegally configured. Predefined auxiliary functions cannot be reconfigured by user-defined auxiliary functions.
处理：Reconfigure the auxiliary function.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4200
消息：Channel %1 geometry axis %2 must not be declared a rotary axis
定义：The geometry axes represent a Cartesian coordinate system and therefore the declaration of a geometry axis as rotary axis leads to a definition conflict.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Remove rotary axis declaration for this machine axis. For this purpose, the geometry axis index for the displayed geometry axis must be determined by means of the channel-specific MD array 20060 AXCONF_GEOAX_NAME_TAB. The channel axis number is stored with the same index in the channel-specific MD array 20050 AXCONF_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB. The channel axis number minus 1 provides the channel axis index under which the machine axis number is fo

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4210
消息：Channel %1 spindle %2 declaration as rotary axis missing
定义：If a machine axis is to be operated as a spindle, this machine axis must be declared as a rotary axis.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Set rotary axis declaration for this machine axis in the axis-specific MD 30300 IS_ROT_AX.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4215
消息：Channel %1 spindle %2 declaration as modulo axis missing
定义：The spindle functionality requires a modulo axis (positions in [deg],.).
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Set MD "ROT_IS_MODULO".

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4220
消息：Channel %1 spindle %2 declared repeatedly
定义：The spindle number exists more than once in the channel.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. The spindle number is stored in the axisspecific MD array 35000 SPIND_ASSIGN_TO_MACHAX. The channel to which this machine axis/spindle is assigned is listed in the machine axis index. (The machine axis number is given in the channel-specific MD array 20070 AXCONF_MACHAX_USED).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4225
消息：Channel %1 axis %2 declaration as rotary axis missing
定义：The modulo functionality requires a rotary axis (positions in [deg],.).
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Set MD "IS_ROT_AX".

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4230
消息：Channel %1 data alteration from external not possible in current channel
定义：It is not allowed to enter this data while the part program is being executed (e.g. setting data for working area limitation or for dry run feedrate).
处理：The data to be entered must be altered before starting the part program.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4240
消息：Runtime overflow for IPO cycle or position controller cycle, IP %1
定义：The settings for the interpolation and position control cycle were modified before the last power-up such that too little computing time is now available for the requisite cyclic task. The alarm occurs immediately after power-up if too little runtime is available even when the axes are stationary and the NC program has not started. However, task overflow can occur only when computation-intensive NC functions are called during program execution.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Take greater care when optimizing the clock times NCK MD 10050 SYSCLOCK_CYCLE_TIME, MD 10060 POSCTRL_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO and/or MD 10070 IPO_SYSCLOCK_TIME_RATIO. The test should be performed with an NC program that represents the worst case. For safety, a margin of 15 to 25% should be added to the times determined in this way.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4250
消息：FastPlcCom functionality not available
定义：This alarm indicates that the PLC provides the None FastPlcCom functionality during start-up although this functionality is requested by the NCK.
处理：Retrofit the PLC with the FastPlcCom functionality or deactivate the FastPlcCom functionality by means of NCK machine data.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4252
消息：PLCIO read error: %1
定义：This alarm indicates that errors occured when reading the PLCIO with the FastPlcCom functionality.
处理：Check machine data MD 10394/10395 or check the PLC hardware configuration.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4254
消息：PLCIO write error: %1
定义：This alarm indicates that errors occured when writing on the PLCIO with the FastPlcCom functionality.
处理：Check machine data MD 10396/103947 or check the PLC hardware configuration.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4260
消息：Machine data %1 illegal
定义：Selected cam pair not activated by MD $MN_SW_ASSIGN_TAB or several cam pairs selected.
处理：Activate the cam pair or select only one cam pair.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4270
消息：Machine data %1 assigns not activated NCK input/output byte %2
定义：The specified machine data assigns a digital input/output byte or an analog input/output signal the processing of which has not been activated to an NC function.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Correct machine data. Activate required inputs/outputs via MDs: - $MN_FASTIO_DIG_NUM_INPUTS - $MN_FASTIO_DIG_NUM_OUTPUTS - $MN_FASTIO_ANA_NUM_INPUTS - $MN_FASTIO_ANA_NUM_OUTPUTS Activation of fast inputs/outputs does not require the corresponding hardware configuration to be available at the control. All functions using fast inputs/outputs can also be made use of by the PLC specification/modification defined in the VDI interface, if the

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4275
消息：Machine data %1 and %2 both assign the same NCK output byte no. %3
定义：The specified machine data assign two NC functions to the same digital/analog output.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Correct machine data.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4280
消息：Assignment of NCK input/output byte via MD %1[%2] does not match
定义：When booting, the required input/output module was not found at the slot specified in the MD.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Check hardware and correct the MD if necessary. Note: Monitoring of the hardware configuration is performed independently of the number of activated inputs/outputs (MD 10300 - 10360 FASTIO_ANA(DIG)_NUM_INPUTS(OUTPUTS))

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4282
消息：Hardware of external NCK outputs assigned repeatedly
定义：Several outputs have been configured on the same hardware byte.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Alter MD 10364 HW_ASSIGN_DIG_FASTOUT or MD 10364 HW_ASSIGN_ANA_FASTOUT.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4285
消息：Error on terminal block %1, error code %2
定义：For SIMODRIVE 611D only: An error occurred on terminal block no. %1 (sign-of-life failure, I/O module removed in current operation etc.). Error code 1: Sign-of-life failure from terminal block Error code 10: Sign-of-life failure NC
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Check hardware.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4290
消息：Sign of life monitoring: local P-bus not alive
定义：The COM computer must alter the sign-of-life on the local P-bus in each SERVO cycle. Monitoring for alteration takes place in the IPO cycle. If the sign of life has not altered, this alarm is triggered.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Check hardware.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4291
消息：Failure of module in local P-bus slot %1, error codes %2 %3 %4
定义：The module on the specified slot has signaled a diagnostics alarm. The error code reported corresponds to the AS300 documentation.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Check hardware.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4300
消息：Declaration in MD %1 is not allowed for axis %2.
定义：The axis cannot be operated as competing positioning axes, for example because the axis is the slave axis within a closed gantry group or a gantry group to be closed.
处理：Reset MD 30450 IS_CONCURRENT_POS_AX for the axis concerned.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4310
消息：Declaration in MD %1 index %2 is not allowed.
定义：The machine data values must be written in the array in ascending order.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Correct the MD.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4320
消息：Axis %1 function %2 %3 and %4 not allowed
定义：The functions declared by the specified machine data cannot simultaneously be active for one axis.
处理：Deactivate one of the functions.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4334
消息：Channel %1 The amount of fine correction in parameter %2 of the
定义：The maximum permissible value of the fine correction in an orientable toolholder is limited by the machine data $MC_TOCARR_FINE_LIM_LIN for linear variables, and by the machine data $MC_TOCARR_FINE_LIM_ROT for rotary variables. The alarm can only occur if the setting data $SC_TOCARR_FINE_CORRECTION is not equal to zero.
处理：Enter a valid fine correction value.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4336
消息：Channel %1 orientable toolholder no. %2 for orientation transformation
定义：The orientable toolholder, with whose data the orientation transformation is to be parameterized (see machine data $MC_TRAFO5_TCARR_NO_1/2), does not exist.
处理：Enter a valid tool-carrier number.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4338
消息：Channel %1 invalid transformation type '%2' in toolholder %3 for
定义：The parameters of the orientation transformation are taken over from the data of an orientable toolholder. This orientable toolholder contains an invalid transformation type. (Types T, P and M are permissible).
处理：Enter a valid transformation type.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4340
消息：Channel %1 block %2 invalid transformation type in transformation no.
定义：An invalid, i.e. undefined, number was entered in one of the machine data TRAFO_TYPE_1 ... TRAFO_TYPE_8. This alarm also occurs if a certain type of transformation is only impossible on the type of control used (e.g. 5-axis transformation on a SINUMERIK 802D).
处理：Enter a valid transformation type.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4341
消息：Channel %1 block %2 no data set available for transformation no. %3
定义：Only a limited number of machine data sets (usually 2) is available for each related group of transformations (e.g. orientation transformations, Transmit, Tracyl, etc.). This alarm is output if an attempt is made to set more transformations from a group. Example: Two orientation transformations are allowed. The machine data contains e.g.: TRAFO_TYPE_1 = 16 ; 1st orientation transformation TRAFO_TYPE_2 = 33 ; 2nd orientation transformation TRAFO_TYPE_3 = 256 ; 1st transmit transformation TRAFO_T
处理：Enter valid machine data.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4342
消息：Channel %1 invalid machine data for general 5-axis transformation error
定义：The machine data which describe the axis directions and the basic orientation and the input axes for the general 5-axis transformation are invalid. The error parameter displayed specifies the cause of the alarm: - 1: The first axis (TRAFO5_AXIS1_*) is not defined (all three entries of the vector are 0) - 2: The second axis (TRAFO5_AXIS2_*) is not defined (all three entries of the vector are 0) - 3: The basic orientation (TRAFO5_BASE_ORIENT_*) is not defined (all three entries of the vector are 0
处理：Set valid machine data.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4343
消息：Channel %1 attempt made to change the machine data of an active
定义：An attempt was made to change the machine data of an active transformation and to activate the machine data with RESET or NEWCONFIG.
处理：Set valid machine data.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4345
消息：Channel %1 invalid configuration in chained transformation no. %2
定义：A chained transformation is incorrectly configured (machine data $MC_TRACON_CHAIN_1 or $MC_TRACON_CHAIN_2). The following causes for the error are possible: - The list of transformations to be chained starts with a 0 (at least one entry not equal to zero is required). - The list of transformations to be chained contains the number of a transformation which does not exist. - The number of a transformation in the list is greater than or equal to the number of the chained transformation. Example:
处理：Set a valid transformation chain.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4346
消息：Channel %1 invalid geoaxis assignment in machine data %2[%3]
定义：Machine data TRAFO_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB_X contains an invalid entry. The following causes for the error are possible: - The entry references a channel axis which does not exist. - The entry is zero (no axis) but the transformation needs the relevant axis as a geometry axis.
处理：Correct the entry in TRAFO_GEOAX_ASSIGN_TAB_X or TRAFO_AXES_IN_X.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4347
消息：Channel %1 invalid channel axis assignment in machine data %2[%3]
定义：Machine data TRAFO_AXIS_IN_X contains an invalid entry. The following causes for the error are possible: - The entry refers to a channel axis which does not exist. - The entry is zero (no axis) but the transformation needs the relevant axis as a channel axis. - More than one external axis has been entered in TRAFO_AXIS_IN_X for the 7-axis transformation.
处理：Correct the entry in TRAFO_AXES_IN_X.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4350
消息：Channel %1 axis identifier %2 machine data %3 not consistent with
定义：MD 32410 JOG_AND_POS_JERK_ENABLE (jerk limitation) and MD 35240 ACCEL_TYPE_DRIVE (acceleration reduction) have been defined as the initial setting for an axis. However, the two functions cannot be activated at the same time for one axis.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Resetting of 32410 JOG_AND_POS_JERK_ENABLE or 35240 ACCEL_TYPE_DRIVE.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4400
消息：MD alteration will cause reorganisation of buffered memory (loss of
定义：A machine data has been altered that configures the buffered memory. If the NCK powers up with the altered data, this will lead to reorganization of the buffered memory and thus to the loss of all buffered user data (part programs, tool data, GUD, leadscrew error compensation, ...)
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. If the control includes user data that has not yet been saved, then a data backup must be performed before the next NCK power-up. By manually resetting the altered MD to the value it had before the last power-up, reorganization of the memory can be avoided.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4502
消息：Channel %1 anachronism %2(%3) -> %4
定义：Previously, in $MC_RESET_MODE_MASK Bit4 and Bit5, the reset behavior of the 6th or 8th G groupe was determined. This setting is now made in $MC_GCODE_RESET_MODE. In order to ensure compatible handling of "old" data backups, the "old" values are taken from $MC_RESET_MODE_MASK and entered in $MC_GCODE_RESET_MODE.
处理：--

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4503
消息：TO unit %1 H number %2 assigned more than once. H number linked
定义：This error can only occur when MD $MN_MM_EXTERN_CNC_SYSTEM= 1 or 2. The Power ON effective machine data bit 10890, $MN_EXTERN_TOOLPROG_MODE, bit 3 has been reset. On reconstructing data handling after Power ON, it has been found that different edges of the same TO unit have the same H number. They had been linked previously. They are linked again and MD bit $MN_EXTERN_TOOLPROG_MODE, bit 3 is set again.
处理：H numbers must be assigned only once in a TO unit. Then, machine data bit 10890, $MN_EXTERN_TOOLPROG_MODE, bit 3 can be set = 0 and a restart can be performed.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4600
消息：Invalid handwheel type for handwheel %1
定义：The handwheel type (hardware segment) for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_SEGMENT is invalid.
处理：Configure a valid type for the corresponding handwheel through machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_SEGMENT.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4610
消息：Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1
定义：For SINUMERIK 840D and SINUMERIK 840DI only: The handwheel module for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE is not available for 840D systems. An 840D system is always regarded as a module. Therefore $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE = 1 must always be set for handwheels directly linked to 840D systems.
处理：Set machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE = 1 for the corresponding handwheel.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4611
消息：Invalid handwheel input for handwheel %1
定义：For SINUMERIK 840D and SINUMERIK 840Di only: The handwheel input for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT is not available for 840D systems. A maximum of 2 or 3 handwheels can be linked directly to 840D systems: 840D powerline: 1st and 2nd handwheels directly to the 840D hardware 840Di: 1st and 2nd handwheels directly to the extension board SIMODRIVE 611D only: 3rd handwheel via free encoder input.
处理：Configure machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT for a valid input for the corresponding handwheel

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4620
消息：Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1
定义：For SINUMERIK 802D only: The handwheel module for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE is not available for 802D systems. An 802D system is always regarded as a module. Therefore$MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE = 1 must always be set for handwheels linked directly to 802D systems.
处理：Set machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE = 1 for the corresponding handwheel.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4621
消息：Invalid handwheel input for handwheel %1
定义：For SINUMERIK 802D only: The handwheel input for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT is not available for 802D systems. A maximum of 2 handwheels can be directly linked to 802D system.
处理：Configure machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT for a valid input for the corresponding handwheel

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4630
消息：Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1
定义：For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: The reference in $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE to a corresponding entry in machine data array $MN_HANDWHEEL_LOGIC_ADDRESS[] which is required for configuring PROFIBUS handwheels is not available.
处理：Configure the machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE for the corresponding PROFIBUS handwheel so that there is a valid reference to an entry in the machine data array $MN_HANDWHEEL_LOGIC_ADDRESS[].

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4631
消息：Invalid handwheel slot for handwheel %1
定义：For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: The handwheel slot for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT is not available for PROFIBUS handwheels.
处理：Configure machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT to a valid handwheel slot for the corresponding PROFIBUS handwheel.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4632
消息：Logical PROFIBUS handwheel slot base address for handwheel %1 not
定义：For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: The logical basic address of the PROFIBUS handwheel slot in machine data array $MN_HANDWHEEL_LOGIC_ADDRESS[] indexed in machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE was not found in the current STEP 7 hardware configuration.
处理：Check if $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE of the corresponding handwheel is correct. Check if indexed logical base address of PROFIBUS handwheel slot in machine date array $MN_HANDWHEEL_LOGIC_ADDRESS[] is correct.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4640
消息：Invalid handwheel module for handwheel %1
定义：For ETHERNET only: The handwheel module for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE is not available for ETHERNET handwheels. $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE = 1 must always be set when configuring ETHERNET handwheels.
处理：Set machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_MODULE = 1 for the corresponding handwheel.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4641
消息：Invalid handwheel input for handwheel %1
定义：For ETHERNET only: The handwheel input for handwheel %1 requested through machine data $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT is not available for ETHERNET handwheels. A maximum of 6 handwheels can be configured.
处理：Configure machine date $MN_HANDWHEEL_INPUT for a valid input for the corresponding handwheel

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4700
消息：PROFIBUS I/O: The logical slot / I/O area address %1 was not found.
定义：For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: The logical slot / I/O area address was not found in machine data MD10500 $MN_DPIO_LOGIC_ADDRESS_IN with the stated slot / I/O area in the current STEP 7 hardware configuration.
处理：Check the slot / I/O area address in the configuration (STEP 7, HW Config).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：4702
消息：PROFIBUS I/O: The logical slot / I/O area address %1 was not found.
定义：For PROFIBUS/PROFINET only: The logical slot / I/O area address was not found in machine data MD10506 $MN_DPIO_LOGIC_ADDRESS_OUT with the stated slot / I/O area index in the current STEP 7 hardware configuration.
处理：Check the slot / I/O area address in the configuration (STEP 7, HW Config).

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：5000
消息：Communication job not executable %1
定义：The communication job (data exchange between NCK and MMC, e.g.: loading an NC part program) cannot be executed because there is insufficient memory space. Cause: Too many communication jobs in parallel.
处理：- Reduce the number of communication jobs taking place at the same time or increase MD10134 $MN_MM_NUM_MMC_UNITS - Restart communication job. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. No remedial measures are possible - the operation triggering the alarm message has to be repeated. Clear the alarm display with Cancel.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6000
消息：Memory reorganized using standard machine data
定义：The memory management was not able to allocate the NC user memory with the values in the machine data. It did not have enough memory available because the total memory available is provided as dynamic and static memory for the NC user (e.g. for macro definitions, user variables, number of tool offsets, number of directories and files etc.).
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Redefine the NC memory structure! A specific machine data for NC user memory allocation cannot be stated to be the cause of the alarm. The MD initiating the alarm therefore has to be determined on the basis of the default values in the machine data by changing the user-specific memory structure step by step. Usually, it is not just one single machine data that has been set too large. Therefore it is advisable to reduce the memory area by

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6010
消息：Channel %1 data block %2 not or not completely created, error code %3
定义：The data management has detected an error in power-up. The specified data block may not have been created. The error number specifies the type of error. If the error number >100000, then there is a fatal system error. Otherwise, the user memory area was made too small. In this case the (user) error codes have the following meaning: - Error number 1: No memory space available - Error number 2: Maximum possible number of symbols exceeded - Error number 3: Index 1 lies outside the valid value range
处理：Correct the machine data or undo the changes made. Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. There are two determining machine data for cycle programs: - $MN_MM_NUM_MAX_FUNC_NAMES = max. number of all cycle programs, error number = 2 shows that this value is too small. - $MN_MM_NUM_MAX_FUNC_PARAM = max. number of all parameters defined in the cycle programs, error number = 2 shows that this value is too small (If these MDs are modified, the memory backup is retained) The follow

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6020
消息：Machine data have been changed - now memory is reorganized
定义：Machine data have been changed that define the NC user memory allocation. Data management has restructured the memory in accordance with the altered machine data.
处理：No remedial measures are required. Any user data that are required must be input again.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6030
消息：Limit of user memory has been adapted
定义：Data management checks during power-up the actually available physical user memory (DRAM, DPRAM and SRAM) with the values in the system-specific machine data 18210 MM_USER_MEM_DYNAMIC, MD 18220 MM_USER_MEM_DPR und MD 18230 MM_- USERMEM_BUFFERED.
处理：No remedial measures are required. The new maximum permissible value can be read from the reduced machine data.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6035
消息：Instead of %1 KB the system has only %2 KB of free user memory of type
定义：The alarm can only occur after a 'cold start' (=NCK start-up with standard machine data). The alarm is only a notice. There is no interference with any NCK functions. It shows that the NCK has less free user memory available than specified by Siemens for this control variant. The value of the actually available free user memory can also be taken from the machine data $MN_INFO_FREE_MEM_DYNAMIC, $MN_INFO_FREE_MEM_STATIC. Siemens supplies NCK with default settings that, depending on the model, have
处理：Reasons for the message: - The NCK contains compile cycle software, that uses so much memory space that the hardware cannot provide the required memory. - The NCK runs on hardware that is not intended for this NCK release (i.e. that has not enough memory capacity). - If the application runs properly with the remaining free user memory (i.e. can be started up without any errors), the message can simply be ignored. - If the actual application cannot be configured because there is not enough memo

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6100
消息：Error while creating %1, error number %2 %3
定义：An error was detected while creating a compile cycle machine data. The error number specifies the type of error. - Error number 1: Insufficient memory available - Error number 2: Symbol in the NCK already exists - Error number 3: Maximum possible number of symbols exceeded - Error number 4: Invalid name prefix - Error number 5: Illegal array size Note: Other errors of this type could have occurred, but have not been displayed.
处理：- Error number 1: The memory reserved by machine data 12328 $MN_MM_CC_MD_MEM_SIZE has to be increased. If the error occurs while loading an archive, then the machine data must be increased "manually". To do this, either Edit the archive with 'arcedit' or Overwrite the MD in the MD picture and prevent the deletion of the machine data when writing the archive (MMC: Set Ask_for_CFG_RESET.INI = 1 in 'dino.ini'). Also refer to: Upgrade instructions P6.x. - Error number 2: Error in the combination or

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6200
消息：Memory for CC MD full.
定义：The memory reserved for storage of compile cycle machine data is full. Some of these machine data could not be created correctly.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. If the alarm is displayed on start-up of compile cycles, this may be remedied by increasing $MN_MM_CC_MD_MEM_SIZE.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6401
消息：Channel %1 tool change not possible: Empty location for tool %2 on
定义：The tool cannot be moved into the selected tool magazine. There is no appropriate location for this tool. A suitable location is mainly determined by the status. The status must indicate that this location is free, not disabled, not reserved and not co-occupied by a tool that is too large. Furthermore, it is important that the type of tool matches the type of any magazine location that may be free. (If, for example, all magazine locations are of the 'B' type and these are all free and the tool i
处理：- Check whether the magazine data have been defined correctly. - Check whether there is still room in the magazine to add another tool; there may not be due to operating procedures. - Check whether a location type hierarchy is defined and whether it, for example, does not allow insertion of a type 'A' tool in a free location with type 'B'.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6402
消息：Channel %1 tool change not possible. Magazine no. %2 not available
定义：The desired tool change is not possible. The magazine with the specified number is not available.
处理：- Check whether the magazine data have been defined correctly. - Check whether the magazine is connected to the desired tool holder/spindle via a distance relation. - The user PLC program may have sent wrong data to the NCK.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6403
消息：Channel %1 tool change not possible. Magazine location number %2 on
定义：The desired tool change is not possible. The specified magazine location is not contained in the specified magazine.
处理：Check whether the magazine data have been defined correctly. The user PLC program may have delivered incorrect data to the NCK.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6404
消息：Channel %1 tool change not possible. Tool %2 not available or not
定义：The desired tool change is not possible. The specified tool does not exist or cannot be inserted.
处理：- Check whether the part program is written correctly. - Check whether the tool data are correctly defined. - Check whether there is a replacement tool which can be used for the specified tool.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6405
消息：Channel %1 command %2 has invalid PLC acknowledge parameter %3 -
定义：The specified command has been answered by the PLC with an invalid acknowledgement in the current context. The following assignments are defined for "command no.": 1 Move tool, load or unload magazine 2 Prepare tool change 3 Execute tool change 4 Prepare tool change and execute with T command 5 Prepare tool change and execute with M command 7 Terminate canceled tool command 8 Check tool movement with reservation 9 Check tool movement 0 Transport acknowledgement Parameters 2 and 3 designate the
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. Erroneous PLC communication: Correct the PLC program.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6406
消息：Channel %1 PLC acknowledge for command %2 is missing
定义：There is still no acknowledgement from the PLC for the tool change. The NCK cannot continue processing until it receives this acknowledgement for the specified command number. Possible command number values are described for alarm 6405.
处理：Please inform the authorized personnel/service department. - Erroneous PLC communication: Correct the PLC program. - It is possible to release NCK with the PLC command 7 from the wait condition. This aborts the waiting command.

系统：Siemens 840D
报警号：6407
消息：Channel %1 tool %2 cannot be placed in magazine %3 on location %4.
定义：A tool change request or a verification request was issued to put the tool in a location which does not satisfy the prerequisites for filling. The following causes for the error are possible: - Location is blocked or not free! - Tool type does not match the location type! - Tool possibly too large, adjacent locations are not free!
处理：- Check whether the magazine data are correctly defined (especially the location type). - Check whether the tool data are correctly defined (especially the location type).

系统：Siemens 840D

If replacement tools are not being used, the duplo number specified has no
处理：For information only. The user must decide what to do.

消息：TO unit %1 tool %2 with tool edge no. %3 has reached tool monitor
定义：This message informs that at least one cutting edge of the time or quantity monitored tool has reached its monitoring limit. The alarm was triggered through the OPI interface (MMC, PLC). The channel context is not defined. The TO unit was specified for this reason.
处理：For information only. The user must decide what to do.

定义：This message informs that at least one cutting edge of the time or quantity monitored tool has reached its monitoring limit. The limit was detected in the channel context. The alarm originated during NC program execution.

定义：This message informs that at least one cutting edge of the time or quantity monitored tool has reached its monitoring limit. The alarm was triggered through the OPI interface (MMC, PLC). The channel context is not defined. The TO unit was specified for this reason.
处理：For information only. The user must decide what to do.

系统：Siemens 840D
